Resourceful.title: Resourcefulness
Resourceful.description: As a child, your captain was resourceful and extremely frugal. Having poor parents meant {pawn_pronoun} never had a lot when growing up, so had no choice but to learn to make do. Waste would never go to waste and {pawn_pronoun} would always find a use for things others would throw away.

Wasteful.title: Wastefulness
Wasteful.description: As a child, your captain was wasteful and careless with whatever {pawn_pronoun} managed to get a hold of. Often squandering what little {pawn_pronoun} had, learning very few lessons about frugality or planning ahead. You cant take it with you, so may as well spend it while you can.
